messages:
Gaddy: hey how are you?
Gaddy: long time no see
Gaddy: let's catch up soon

Gaddy: good morning!
Gaddy: thanks for the help yesterday
Gaddy: have a great day
Gaddy: you've got this, keep up the great work!
Gaddy: I'll call you today about the invoice

expected_commitments.context: I'll call you today about the invoice

messages: Gaddy: let's grab coffee sometime

Alice: can you send me the report by Friday?
Bob: sure, I'll have it ready by Friday

expected_commitments.context: sure, I'll have it ready by Friday

messages:
Gaddy: I'm waiting for the bank to process the loan
Gaddy: nothing I can do until they respond

expected_commitments.context: I'm waiting for the bank to process the loan

messages: Gaddy: let me think about it and get back to you
policy_note: Generic callback without a specific topic or deadline is not a commitment.

messages:
Dana: can you approve the quote?
Gaddy: let me think about the quote and get back to you tomorrow

expected_commitments.required_action: Get back to Dana about the quote
expected_commitments.context: let me think about the quote and get back to you tomorrow

policy_note: Contrastive pair with generic_callback_ignore: adding topic + deadline makes it a commitment.

messages: Gaddy: if they send the quote, I'll approve it
policy_note: Conditional promise where condition has not been met → ignore, not a commitment yet.

messages: Gaddy: I might be able to send the documents tomorrow, but I'm not sure

expected_commitments.context: I might be able to send the documents tomorrow, but I'm not sure

policy_note: Hedged language ('might', 'maybe') with no clear commitment → unclear, not ignore.

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents by tomorrow

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by tomorrow

messages:
Alice: Bob, can you send me the report by Friday?
Bob: sorry, I won't be able to do it this week

Alice: we need someone to prepare the report by Friday
Bob: I can't, I'm swamped
Charlie: I'll do it, I'll have it ready by Friday

expected_commitments.context: I'll do it, I'll have it ready by Friday

messages: Gaddy: someone needs to call the supplier about the order

expected_commitments.context: someone needs to call the supplier about the order

policy_note: 'Someone needs to do X' has no committed party → unclear.

messages: Gaddy: the contractor needs to finish the renovation by next week

expected_commitments.context: the contractor needs to finish the renovation by next week

policy_note: Party implied by role title, not a named person.

messages: Gaddy: Dana will handle the invoice payment by Friday

expected_commitments.context: Dana will handle the invoice payment by Friday

policy_note: Speaker names someone else as responsible without their confirmation → commitment with named person as party.

messages:
Alice: I talked to the lawyer yesterday
Alice: he said he'll file the motion by Wednesday

expected_commitments.context: he said he'll file the motion by Wednesday

policy_note: Party must be inferred from conversational context, not explicitly named in the commitment sentence.

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents by Friday

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by Friday

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents by tomorrow

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by tomorrow

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents next Monday

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents next Monday

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents by July 15

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by July 15

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents by end of week

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by end of week

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents soon

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents soon

policy_note: 'soon' is not a concrete deadline → null.

messages:
Gaddy: I'll send the documents by Friday
Gaddy: actually, let me send them by tomorrow instead

expected_commitments.context: actually, let me send them by tomorrow instead

policy_note: When two deadlines are mentioned, use the most recent/specific one.

messages: Gaddy: I'll have the report ready by Friday

expected_commitments.context: I'll have the report ready by Friday

messages: Gaddy: I'll send over the docs tomorrow

expected_commitments.context: I'll send over the docs tomorrow

messages: Gaddy: I'll get the paperwork to you tomorrow

expected_commitments.context: I'll get the paperwork to you tomorrow

messages: Dana: I'll take care of the invoice payment today

expected_commitments.context: I'll take care of the invoice payment today

messages: Dana: I'll settle the invoice by Friday

expected_commitments.context: I'll settle the invoice by Friday

messages: Gaddy: I'll make sure the invoice is taken care of by Friday

expected_commitments.context: I'll make sure the invoice is taken care of by Friday

policy_note: Vague indirect action ('make sure it's taken care of') → extract the underlying action.

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents tomorrow

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents tomorrow

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972503333333@c.us", "chat_name": "Supplier - Mike", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Call the supplier", "deadline": null, "context": "Need to call the supplier about the order", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I'll call you later today

expected_commitments.context: I'll call you later today

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "I'll send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}, {"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Call the supplier", "deadline": null, "context": "Need to call the supplier about the order", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents by Friday instead

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by Friday instead

policy_note: With multiple existing commitments, only update the one that changed.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "120363000003@g.us", "chat_name": "Report Review", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "I'll send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: Dana will also send her documents by Friday

expected_commitments.context: Dana will also send her documents by Friday

policy_note: Same action but different party → new commitment, not an update.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "I'll send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages:
Gaddy: I sent the documents yesterday
Gaddy: they should have arrived

expected_commitments.context: I sent the documents yesterday

messages: Gaddy: I sent the documents yesterday

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "120363000004@g.us", "chat_name": "Office Logistics", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Call the supplier", "deadline": null, "context": "forget about calling the supplier, I found another source", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages:
Gaddy: forget about calling the supplier
Gaddy: I found another source

expected_commitments.context: forget about calling the supplier, I found another source

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-400", "chat_id": "972505555555@c.us", "chat_name": "Dana", "committed_party": "Dana", "required_action": "Pay the invoice", "deadline": "2025-01-06", "context": "Dana will pay the invoice by Monday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Dana: done, the invoice is paid

expected_commitments.context: done, the invoice is paid

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "I'll send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I'll definitely send the documents tomorrow as promised

expected_commitments.context: I'll definitely send the documents tomorrow as promised

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "I'll send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: almost done with the documents
policy_note: Being almost done is not done — no update.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972503333333@c.us", "chat_name": "Supplier - Mike", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Call the supplier", "deadline": null, "context": "Need to call the supplier about the order", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I'll do it, I'll call you today

expected_commitments.context: I'll do it, I'll call you today

policy_note: 'Will do' is a future promise, not a completion.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-300", "chat_id": "120363000003@g.us", "chat_name": "Report Review", "committed_party": "Bob", "required_action": "Prepare the report", "deadline": "2025-01-10", "context": "Bob will prepare the report by Friday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Charlie: Alice told me Bob submitted the report yesterday

expected_commitments.context: Alice told me Bob submitted the report yesterday

policy_note: Third-party reports completion of someone else's commitment → done.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "I'll send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}, {"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Pay the rent", "deadline": "2025-01-10", "context": "I'll pay the rent by Friday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages:
Gaddy: forget about sending the documents and paying the rent
Gaddy: we don't need either anymore

expected_commitments.context: forget about sending the documents
and paying the rent

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "I'll send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}, {"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972501111111@c.us", "chat_name": "Rachel", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Pay the rent", "deadline": "2025-01-10", "context": "I'll pay the rent by Friday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages:
Gaddy: I'll send the documents by Friday instead of tomorrow
Gaddy: forget about paying the rent, I found a cheaper place

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by Friday instead of tomorrow
forget about paying the rent, I found a cheaper place

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-300", "chat_id": "120363000003@g.us", "chat_name": "Report Review", "committed_party": "Bob", "required_action": "Send the report", "deadline": "2025-01-10", "context": "I'll send the report by Friday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}, {"id": "abc-400", "chat_id": "120363000003@g.us", "chat_name": "Report Review", "committed_party": "Dana", "required_action": "Pay the invoice", "deadline": "2025-01-06", "context": "I'll pay the invoice by Monday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages:
Bob: I sent the report this morning
Dana: and I paid the invoice yesterday

expected_commitments.context: I sent the report this morning
and I paid the invoice yesterday
